item.title: poncle to establish Japan studio led by El Shaddai creator Sawaki Takeyasu
item.content:encoded:
poncle interested in creating new intellectual properties.

Vampire Survivors developer poncle will establish a new studio based in Japan, with El Shaddai: Ascension of the Metatron creator and crim CEO Sawaki Takeyasu as its head, the latest issue of Weekly Famitsu reveals.

In an interview with the magazine, poncle founder and Vampire Survivors creator Luca Galante said the idea of opening a Japanese studio had been on his mind for years due to his longtime admiration for Japanese games and positive experiences visiting Japan.

That idea eventually took shape when Galante was introduced to Takeyasu through poncle chief strategy officer Matteo Sapio around 2023.

Both Galante and Takeyasu admire each other’s work. The company name “poncle” originates from the Poncles featured in Okami, a title on which Takeyasu served as a character designer, while Galante has long been a fan of his artwork. Takeyasu, who met Galante during the development of his own title Mythical Concept: STARNAUT, was already a fan of Vampire Survivors.

In his new role as head of poncle’s Japan studio, Takeyasu will support the company’s broader goals while establishing a foundation in Japan. A long-term team size has yet to be determined, but poncle intends to continue operating with relatively small development teams.

According to Galante, creating games the team wants to make, respecting players, and prioritizing accessibility form the core principles of poncle’s game development philosophy, and those values will continue to shape future projects.

Going forward, the plan is for regional teams to pursue separate projects. While collaboration between regions remains possible, development will largely be handled independently, and Galante confirmed that a future project could emerge from the Japan studio.

Takeyasu said he hopes to build a studio driven by passion rather than market trends, and create opportunities for aspiring developers regardless of age or experience. He also wants to increase awareness of Vampire Survivors in Japan and foster an environment where creators can experiment with new ideas through smaller-scale productions.

In addition to its plans to open shop in Japan, poncle has established a new studio in Italy. Galante said that while future projects may continue to draw from the Vampire Survivors universe, the company is also interested in creating new intellectual properties.

poncle’s newest title, Vampire Crawlers: The Turbo Wildcard from Vampire Survivors, launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on April 21.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/poncle-to-establish-japan-studio-led-by-el-shaddai-creator-sawaki-takeyasu
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: ELDERBORN: VENGEANCE announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
Hyperstrange has announced ELDERBORN: VENGEANCE, a new entry in its first-person melee action series. It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

About

The metal first-person perspective slasher is back with faster, heavier, unapologetically brutal melee combat! Hook, kick, counter, and crush enemies where movement, positioning, and your surroundings become weapons. Draw your merciless blade and deliver vengeance with glorious finishers!

Visceral First-Person Perspective Melee Combat With Arcade Movement

ELDERBORN: VENGEANCE brings brutal first-person melee combat into the age of blood, iron, and ancient gods—heavier in impact, faster in motion, and more responsive than before. Unleash the new hook to close the distance, lure them to the edge, and kick their pathetic forms into the pit. Dodge incoming blows and answer with powerful counters, break their guard with heavy slashes, or outflank enemies, climb above them, and come down with a crushing aerial assault.

Every fight is a trial of timing, force, and position—close the distance, change the angle, exploit the opening, and turn the battlefield into a slaughter pit of your own making.

Lethal Weapons Forged Around Your Style

Choose from a wide arsenal split into distinct weapon types like two-handed, one-handed, polearms, or fist weapons. Each type carries its own law of violence: every two-handed strike is uninterruptible, one-handed weapons offer higher accuracy, and fist weapons hit harder the faster you move.

Progression goes deeper than raw stats. With each level, raise your core attributes, unlock additional skills, and shape your build through unique perks. Each weapon type has its own skill tree, and the more you fight with a given type, the more mastery you gain to unlock abilities made for that path. Devote yourself to one path or divide your training between several, then upgrade specific weapons with pieces found throughout the world to forge deadly combinations around the way you fight.

Blood-Soaked Tale of Vengeance From the Forgotten World Before Ours

ELDERBORN: VENGEANCE takes you deeper into the ancient world that came before ours—a harsh cradle from which known civilizations would one day rise. This is a tale of blood, ancient demigods, and a legend that begins when someone close to you is taken by the rulers of that world. You will go after those who took them, following the path of vengeance through forgotten lands, buried secrets, and enemies who still believe power makes them untouchable.

Watch the announcement trailer below.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/elderborn-vengeance-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
